description: Services Layer Improvement (B+ to A Grade) - Refactor services for better maintainability with event-driven architecture, registry patterns, and parallel processing

userStories.title: Create EventBus Type Definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need type definitions for the event system so that all event handlers are type-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Export all types from barrel file `app/services/events/index.ts`
userStories.notes: Implemented 2026-01-29. Created types.ts with WorkoutPluginEvents, IEventBus, and helper types. Barrel export in index.ts.

userStories.title: Implement Asynchronous EventBus Class
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an asynchronous event bus implementation so that events can be queued and processed without blocking.
acceptanceCriteria: Use async event queue with `queueMicrotask()` for async delivery
Implement handler map with proper TypeScript generics
Implement `destroy()` method that clears all handlers
Handle errors in handlers gracefully (log but don't break other handlers)

userStories.title: Add EventBus Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for EventBus to ensure reliable event delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: Test multiple handlers for same event
Test error in one handler doesn't break others

userStories.title: Create FileWatcherService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service that watches file changes and emits events so that caches can be invalidated automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Watch CSV file via `vault.on('modify')` and emit `data:changed` event
Watch exercise folder for file changes and emit `file:modified` event
Use `plugin.registerEvent()` for automatic cleanup on plugin unload

userStories.title: Add FileWatcherService Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for FileWatcherService to verify file watching behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Test CSV file modification emits `data:changed` event
Test exercise folder file modification emits `file:modified` event

userStories.title: Create IDataService Interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an interface for DataService so that it can be easily mocked in tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Define all public methods of DataService in the interface

userStories.title: Add EventBus Integration to DataService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DataService to subscribe to events so that cache is invalidated automatically when files change.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional `eventBus` parameter to DataService constructor
Subscribe to `data:changed` event to clear cache

userStories.title: Optimize DataService ensureColumnExists Method
userStories.description: As a developer, I need optimized column management so that adding columns doesn't require full CSV re-parse.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify `ensureColumnExists()` to append to header only when column missing
Invalidate columnCache when data cache is cleared
Add debug logging when cache cleared due to size limit

userStories.title: Update DataService Tests for EventBus
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updated tests to verify EventBus integration in DataService.
acceptanceCriteria: Test cache clears on `settings:changed` event for csvLogFilePath

userStories.title: Create ViewRegistry Type Definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need type definitions for the view registry pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Define `VIEW_TYPE` enum: CHART, TABLE, TIMER, DASHBOARD, DURATION

userStories.title: Implement ViewRegistry Class
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a ViewRegistry implementation to manage view instances and reduce coupling.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `cleanup()` method that calls cleanup on all registered views

userStories.title: Add ViewRegistry Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for ViewRegistry.
acceptanceCriteria: Test `get()` retrieves correct view by type
Test `get()` returns undefined for unregistered type
Test `cleanup()` calls cleanup on all views

userStories.title: Create TimerRegistry for Timer State Management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a separate registry for timer-specific state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `cleanup()` that stops all active timers

userStories.title: Add TimerRegistry Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests for TimerRegistry to verify timer state management.
acceptanceCriteria: Test `register()` adds timer with unique ID
Test `remove()` removes timer and calls cleanup

userStories.title: Refactor CodeBlockProcessorService to Use ViewRegistry
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CodeBlockProcessorService refactored to use ViewRegistry for reduced coupling.
acceptanceCriteria: Update handler methods to use `viewRegistry.get()` instead of direct view references

userStories.title: Update CodeBlockProcessorService Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updated tests for the refactored CodeBlockProcessorService.
acceptanceCriteria: Test all code block types still work correctly

userStories.title: Add EventBus Integration to ExerciseDefinitionService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ExerciseDefinitionService to subscribe to file events for automatic cache invalidation.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear cache when exercise folder files change

userStories.title: Implement Parallel File Scanning in ExerciseDefinitionService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need parallel file scanning so that exercise definitions load faster.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify `scanExerciseFolder()` to use `Promise.all()` with batch size of 10
Handle errors gracefully with `.catch(() => null)` per file
Filter out null results from failed parses
Maintain same output format as before

userStories.title: Update ExerciseDefinitionService Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need updated tests for ExerciseDefinitionService improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: Test parallel scanning processes files correctly
Test error handling in parallel scanning (one file failure doesn't break others)

userStories.title: Create Filter Strategy Interfaces
userStories.description: As a developer, I need strategy interfaces for DataFilter to enable flexible filtering.
acceptanceCriteria: Define `filter(data: WorkoutLogData[], params: FilterParams): FilterResult` method

userStories.title: Implement ExerciseFilterStrategy
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an exercise filter strategy for the strategy pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract exercise filtering logic from current DataFilter
Handle exact match, fuzzy match, filename match, exercise field match

userStories.title: Implement WorkoutFilterStrategy
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a workout filter strategy for the strategy pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract workout filtering logic from current DataFilter

userStories.title: Convert DataFilter to Instance-Based with Strategy Pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DataFilter converted to instance-based so strategies can be injected for testing.
acceptanceCriteria: Convert DataFilter class to accept strategies array in constructor
Use default strategies when none provided

userStories.title: Add Backward-Compatible DataFilter Static Wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a static wrapper for backward compatibility with existing code.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `DataFilterStatic` class or static methods that wrap instance
Existing code using static methods continues to work
No changes required to code using DataFilter statically

userStories.title: Update DataFilter Tests for Strategy Pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive tests for the refactored DataFilter.
acceptanceCriteria: Test instance methods with default strategies
Test backward compatibility with static wrapper
Coverage at 90%+ for DataFilter.ts and all strategy files

userStories.title: Update main.ts Service Initialization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need main.ts updated to initialize services in correct dependency order.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize CodeBlockProcessorService with ViewRegistry and TimerRegistry

userStories.title: Update main.ts Service Cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need main.ts to clean up services in correct reverse order.
acceptanceCriteria: No console errors during plugin unload

userStories.title: Integration Testing - Full Service Layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests to verify all services work together correctly.
